title: Solve the math problem correctly to dismiss the alarm
preconditions: The user is on the puzzle-solving screen with the math problem displayed
test_steps: Click on the number '1' in the number grid | Click on the number '5' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '2' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '2' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '3' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '3' in the number grid | Click on the checkmark button to submit the answer
expected_result: The progress indicator should disappear, and the alarm should be dismissed

title: Solve the math problem incorrectly to ensure the alarm remains
preconditions: The user is on the puzzle-solving screen with the math problem displayed
test_steps: Click on the number '1' in the number grid | Click on the number '5' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '2' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '2' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '3' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '3' in the number grid | Click on the checkmark button to submit the answer
expected_result: The progress indicator should remain, and the alarm should not be dismissed

preconditions: The user is on the puzzle-solving screen with the math problem displayed
test_steps: Click on the number '1' in the number grid | Click on the number '5' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '2' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '2' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '3' in the number grid | Click on the '+' button in the number grid | Click on the number '3' in the number grid | Click on the checkmark button to submit the answer
